rows.label: tlk44300183_02_msg0001
rows.name:
I just had meat, first time in
ages! I feel so nourished! Yum!

rows.label: tlk44300183_02_msg0002
rows.name:
You gotta remember, it's hard to
get edible meat round these parts.

rows.label: tlk44300183_02_msg0003
rows.name:
Thanks to foreign trade resuming,
we can get meat now! Still only
a little, but progress!
